inputs.prompt: Task Router data/persistence work item and Architect data contracts
inputs.context: Pipeline context including schema requirements, retention, and migration constraints

outputs.primary: Schema/data design and persistence implementation guidance with migration and backup plan
outputs.format: Structured schema definition, access patterns, migrations, and verification checklist

failure_handling.on_migration_risk: Provide rollback and restore plan; reduce blast radius; stage migrations safely
failure_handling.on_data_integrity_issue: Prioritize correctness; add validation and recovery; document incident and fix
